---
title: "Music"
author: "Nico Steckhan"
output: html_document
---

Music and sound design are a parallel strand of my work and creative practice. Under Audiophil Arts, I work with guitar, vocals, electronics, and electroacoustic production.

## Audiophil Arts

At [biotube.de](https://www.biotube.de/) I collect music, videos, and project material around Audiophil Arts. The work sits between songwriting, experimental electronics, and modern sound design.

## Sound and sonification

My interest in music also connects back to research and teaching. I am particularly interested in sonification, in listening as a way of exploring data, and in the overlap between artistic practice and digital health technologies.

## Links

- [Audiophil Arts / biotube.de](https://www.biotube.de/)
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/audiophil_arts/)
- [Twitter / X](https://twitter.com/_audiophil_)
